title: Vacancy for Category Manager at OYO Rooms Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Category Manager at OYO Rooms Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Join the OYO Rooms Digital Technologies family as a Category Manager in Pimpri-Chinchwad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About OYO Rooms Digital Technologies:
OYO Rooms Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with OYO Rooms Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
